section_1.title: Who we are
section_1.content: processes personal data of users of our Services, including the website and WhatsApp‑bot (hereinafter together — «Services»).

section_2.title: Terms and legal bases
section_2.personal_data: «Personal data» — any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person.
section_2.legal_basis: We process data on the basis of: (i) contract/offer fulfillment; (ii) legitimate interests (e.g., protection against spam and abuse); (iii) consent (where required, including for marketing); (iv) legal obligations.
section_2.compliance: This policy complies with Russian Federal Law 152-FZ, GDPR/UK GDPR, UAE Federal Law №45/2021 (PDPL) — where applicable.

section_3.title: What data we collect
section_3.whatsapp_ids: WhatsApp identifiers (WA ID), phone number (masked/hashed when stored — where applicable), profile name.
section_3.whatsapp_messages: Message content, attachments (files/images/voice), metadata (time, delivery status).
section_3.whatsapp_events: Technical events from Meta (webhook): delivery, read, messages, status.
section_3.website_cookies: Cookies and similar technologies (log files, localStorage);
section_3.external_content: OAuth/SSO providers, payment systems (only necessary details), messengers.

section_4.title: How we use data
section_4.service: Providing Service features and responding to requests via WhatsApp bot/chat;
section_4.support: User support, quality improvement and personalization;
section_4.marketing: Marketing messages (only with consent and opt-out option);
section_4.legal: Compliance with legal requirements and responding to government requests.

section_5.title: Legal bases (GDPR art. 6)
section_5.contract: Contract (art. 6(1)(b)) — when you interact with the bot to receive services;
section_5.legitimate: Legitimate interests (art. 6(1)(f)) — security, abuse prevention, analytics;
section_5.consent: Consent (art. 6(1)(a)) — marketing, optional cookies, integrations requiring consent;

section_6.title: Storage and retention
section_6.intro: We store data no longer than necessary for processing purposes or legally required retention periods. Typical periods:

section_7.title: Third-party sharing
section_7.intro: We only share data when necessary:
section_7.meta: Meta Platforms (WhatsApp Cloud API) — message delivery and system events;
section_7.dpa: Data Processing Agreements (DPA) are in place with all contractors and security measures are applied.

section_8.title: Cross-border transfers
section_8.content: If data is transferred outside your country, we apply lawful mechanisms (SCCs/adequacy/local grounds) and technical protection measures (encryption at rest and in transit).

section_9.title: Security
section_9.encryption: TLS encryption in transit, storage encryption;
section_9.secrets: Token/secret storage in Secret Manager, regular rotation;
section_9.masking: Pseudonymization/masking of sensitive fields (e.g., phone numbers).

section_10.title: Your rights
section_10.withdrawal: Withdrawal of consent at any time (does not affect lawfulness of prior processing);
section_10.objection: Objection to processing based on legitimate interest;
section_10.complaint: Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (Roskomnadzor / your local DPA).

section_11.title: Children
section_11.content: Services are not intended for persons under {min_age} years of age. We do not knowingly collect such data.

section_12.title: Cookies and local storage
section_12.content: We use necessary cookies for site operation and, with consent, analytics/marketing cookies. Details and management — in our Cookie Policy or consent banner.

section_13.title: Policy changes
section_13.content: We may periodically update the Policy. The new version is published on this page; update date is indicated at the top.
